sleepTargets.label: Nap 1
sleepTargets.notes: A slightly earlier first nap is kinder than pushing through.

sleepTargets.label: Nap 2
sleepTargets.notes: Protect this nap if the first nap ran short.

sleepTargets.label: Nap 3
sleepTargets.notes: Keep this one brief so bedtime still lands smoothly.

sleepTargets.label: Bedtime
sleepTargets.notes: A short final wake window usually works better than stretching too far.

feedTargets.label: Early evening feed
feedTargets.notes: This helps the late part of the day feel less frantic.

feedTargets.label: Bedtime feed
feedTargets.notes: Use the bedtime feed as part of the wind-down.

notes: Here's Somni's customised baseline plan to help {{babyName}} start sleeping better. Somni will adjust it as we learn more and as your baby grows and develops.
